steps.label: System Info
steps.desc: Shows Windows version, RAM, disk usage and security status

steps.label: Wallpaper M-Auto
steps.cmd: $d=Join-Path $env:APPDATA 'M-Auto'; New-Item $d -ItemType Directory -Force -EA SilentlyContinue|Out-Null; $w=Join-Path $d 'wallpaper.png'; Write-Output 'Downloading wallpaper...'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol=[Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadFile('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mclaudiopt/m-auto.online/main/IMG/mauto/m-auto-rust.png',$w); $sz=[math]::Round((Get-Item $w).Length/1KB); Write-Output "Downloaded: ${sz}KB"; Write-Output 'Applying wallpaper...'; Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System;using System.Runtime.InteropServices;public class WPS{[DllImport("user32.dll",CharSet=CharSet.Auto)]static extern int SystemParametersInfo(int a,int b,string c,int d);public static void Set(string p){SystemParametersInfo(20,0,p,3);}}' -EA SilentlyContinue; [WPS]::Set($w); Write-Output 'Wallpaper applied'

steps.label: BitLocker OFF
steps.desc: Disable BitLocker encryption on C: drive

steps.label: Firewall OFF
steps.desc: Disable Windows Firewall on all profiles

steps.label: Tamper Protection OFF
steps.desc: Disable Defender Tamper Protection via registry

steps.label: Install 7-Zip
steps.cmd: $i=Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*' -EA SilentlyContinue|?{$_.DisplayName -like '*7-Zip*'}; if(-not $i){$d='C:\M-auto\Temp'; md $d -Force -EA SilentlyContinue|Out-Null; $t="$d\7z.exe"; irm 'https://www.7-zip.org/a/7z2409-x64.exe' -OutFile $t; Start-Process $t '/S' -Wait; del $t -Force; Write-Output 'OK'}else{Write-Output 'ALREADY INSTALLED'}

steps.label: Create Restore Point
steps.cmd: Enable-ComputerRestore -Drive 'C:\' -EA SilentlyContinue; Checkpoint-Computer -Description 'M-Auto Backup' -RestorePointType MODIFY_SETTINGS -EA Stop
